titleStmt.title: SII 15.52: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 52. (B.K. No. 115-A of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two slabs built into the wall (left of entrance) of Trikūṭēśvara temple.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Yuva, Prathamāshāḍha pūrṇimā, Thursday, lunar Eclipse. This date which corresponds to 1155 A.D., June 16, Thursday, is identical with that of No. 51 above.

It records that Hollagāvuṇḍa, of Mōraka family, who was the Mahāprabhu of Hosavūr, made a gift of land and the dasavanda income from his garden for feeding the ascetics. The recipient of the gift was Jñānaśakti, the āchārya of the Mōrakēśvara temple. The record gives an account of the ancestors of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmati�dakuḷōdbhavaṁ kunnulavīravaṁśapradīpakaṁ paṁnagadhvajavirājamāna vyāghralāṁchanaṁ pagavara bhīmaṁ koṟavaṁkarāma
muḷuguṁdavidyādharaṁ nāmādisamasta praśastisahitaṁ śrimanmaḷugunda hanneraḍaṟa manneyaṁ bopparasaru tavage naḍeva manneyada suṁkamaṁ dēvara tōṁṭadeleya hēranitakkaṁ caṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭar . © Intu negaṟtevettakhiḷa dharmmadoḷītane nōḷpaḍalte cairaṁtana dharmanandananadhiṣṭhitavairibhujapratāpa vikrāṁtadoḷītanalte raghunandananendu jagajjanaṁ poga ḷvaṁtesadirddanalte vibhu nāki
gā�ṇḍanatarkyavikramaṁ . kanda . Ātana kulavadhu himavajjātege peṁpiṁ sama satītvadoḷavani jātege sariyane negaḻdaḷiḷātaḷasaṁstutyabhōgyavāgī gavuṁḍi . Iṁtu nagaṟtevette
sava dampatigaḷga tanūjanādanāśāntavivarttikīrtti jamadagnigavā negaṟdirdda rēṇukī kāṁtagavappavōlparaśurāmananippa suputranātmavikrāṁtavinirjjitāri vibhu holligavu
ṇḍanudāttavikramaṁ . va . Iṁtenisi negaṟtevaḍeda mahānubhāvana vīramaṁ vitaraṇa muma doreyadandaḍe . vṛtta . bagayē nīvaḷavaṁ vicārisuve nāneṁbartthi kayyāṁ � nōḍuge ba
lupaṁ parikippenamba baḷavadvīrāri māṟāntu nōḍuge tō[rkkuṁ Alliyo]rbbanaṁtakana kūrppaṁ bēḍaveṁdī jagaṁ pogaḷguṁ holligavuṇḍanoḷsamanisirddhaudāryyaśauryyaṁ gaḷaṁ .
calavaṁbōnidhigaṁbudoṭṭana calaṁ cāgaṁ mukuṁdaṁge bhūtaḷavaṁ koṭṭana cāgava vanaṁge®dirddanaṇmeṁdoḍārccaladoḷcāgadoḷaṇminūḷpore peṟarnnōḷpā gaḷaṁdī caturjjaladhivyāvṛtadhātri baṇṇisutavirkkuṁ ho
lligāvuṇḍanaṁ . vinayakkōjege bījavāda nuḍi saubhāgya celviṁge toyvu dhātrigīyartthiganvitargge kayvākkartthevādārppu tananagoṭṭirddudenalke pōlvare peṟarnnōḷvāgaḷī viśvamēdiniyoḷ holligā
vuṇḍanaṁ ripusarōjaśrēṇi vēdaṇḍanaṁ . husiyade sājadoḷu madameysiri lōbhame [Eḷde] ka�ḍi chadrisuvude gā ryamāge nagaḻdaṁnyaroḷēṁ nage yiṁdavādaḍaṁ pusiyade kādi meydegeyade
viva kūḍi perccisuva guṇakke tāne nale holligavuṇḍanadeṁtu nōḷpoḍaṁ . dīnaṁgalladadārigāgadu dhanaṁ tānembanāḷmātu bāndhavargge śiṣṭarggaṁ maruḷgoṁḍene dānaṁ geydu dharitriyaṁ bali mu
kuṁdaṁgeṁdaḍe nāḍanembā nirbhāgyanadeṁtu sōltapano pēḷ śrī holligāvuṇḍanaṁ . janavaṁdyaṁ himāmburāśi kiriyayyaṁ mallagāvuṇḍanartthinidhānaṅkalikālamēru giri bhāvaṁ kāvagāvuṇḍanaṁnte
nirvaridoppuva ghanabhujadvaṁdvagaḷiṁmbīmanantaniśaṁ holligāvuṇḍaneṁdu pogaḷguṁ viśvaṁbharāmaṇḍaḷaṁ © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti traiḷōkyamalladēvavarṣada 6 neya yuva saṁ
vatsarada prathamāṣāḍhada puṇnami bṛhaspativāra sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu svasti sakaḷa guṇamaṇigaṇāḷaṁkṛtagātranuṁ sujanajanamitranuṁ śivadharmmaramyaharmyamāṇikya rāja
nuṁ nijāśritajanavipa[da*dri]kuḷiśanuṁ haracaraṇanakhakiraṇakusumamaṁjarīpariraṁjitō ttamāṁganuṁ śivakathāprasaṁganuṁ mōrakakuḷanabhastaḷīgabhastimāliyuṁ durdamapratāpa
śāliyumappa hosavūra mahāprabhu hollagāvuṇḍaṁ mōrakēśvaradēvarācāryyarappa jñānaśaktidēvara kālaṁ karcci kaidhāreyeṟedu tapōdhanarāhāradānakke biṭṭa matta rondu
Ā kayya sthaḷaṁ tanna gāvuṇḍageyyoḷage mūlasthānadēvara tapōdhanarāhāradānakke biṭṭa keyyindaṁ mūḍalu matta kadaṁbageyyiṁ teṁkalu mūlasthānadēvara tōṭadiṁda
rondu tōṁṭadāya dasavaṁdamumaṁ biṭṭaru spadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
Digital edition of SII 15.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
